sections.title: Highlights

text.value: Master’s in Applied Data Science with \textbf{3+ years} of experience using \textbf{Python}, \textbf{SQL}, and statistical modeling to clean complex data, build reliable features, and support production analytics and machine learning workflows.

bullets.raw_text: Master’s in Applied Data Science with \textbf{3+ years} of experience using \textbf{Python}, \textbf{SQL}, and statistical modeling to clean complex data, build reliable features, and support production analytics and machine learning workflows.

text.value: Partnered with engineers, researchers, and business stakeholders to investigate ambiguous data issues, define trustworthy metrics, and turn messy operational data into decision-ready dashboards, APIs, and reproducible analysis pipelines.

bullets.raw_text: Partnered with engineers, researchers, and business stakeholders to investigate ambiguous data issues, define trustworthy metrics, and turn messy operational data into decision-ready dashboards, APIs, and reproducible analysis pipelines.

text.value: Specialized in \textbf{data quality}, validation, and experimentation; built automated evaluation and monitoring frameworks that improved model reliability, reduced debugging time by \textbf{40\%}, and increased trust in production decision support systems.

sections.title: Skills

skills_categories.raw_source: Data Quality & data cleaning, data validation frameworks, missing value handling, outlier detection, inconsistency checks, feature engineering
Statistical Analysis \& ML & statistical analysis, experimentation, hypothesis testing, A/B testing, causal inference, Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost, CatBoost, SHAP
Data Visualization & Power BI, Matplotlib, Seaborn, stakeholder-ready dashboards, KPI reporting
Data Engineering & PostgreSQL, ETL/ELT, PySpark, Dagster, data pipelines, event logging, telemetry
Collaboration \& Documentation & cross-functional collaboration, metric definition, authoritative documentation, reproducible workflows, self-serve reporting

sections.title: Experience

text.value: Built an Agentic AI system of claims knowledge retrieval by deploying an \textbf{AKS-hosted RAG assistant} built with \textbf{FastAPI and LangChain} that serves \textbf{500+ queries/day} for \textbf{100+ claims adjusters}, cutting manual search time by \textbf{60\%}.

bullets.raw_text: Built an Agentic AI system of claims knowledge retrieval by deploying an \textbf{AKS-hosted RAG assistant} built with \textbf{FastAPI and LangChain} that serves \textbf{500+ queries/day} for \textbf{100+ claims adjusters}, cutting manual search time by \textbf{60\%}.

text.value: Increased reliability of ML workflows by building an automated evaluation pipeline in Python with \textbf{PostgreSQL}-backed logging that tracked accuracy, faithfulness, and latency across \textbf{3} production releases, reducing model debugging time by \textbf{40\%}.

bullets.raw_text: Increased reliability of ML workflows by building an automated evaluation pipeline in Python with \textbf{PostgreSQL}-backed logging that tracked accuracy, faithfulness, and latency across \textbf{3} production releases, reducing model debugging time by \textbf{40\%}.

text.value: Delivered a \textbf{CatBoost-based risk-scoring API} (Flask + PostgreSQL) that prioritizes \textbf{1{,}200+ cases/month}, improving triage efficiency by \textbf{15\%} through explainable decision support embedded into case management workflows.

bullets.raw_text: Delivered a \textbf{CatBoost-based risk-scoring API} (Flask + PostgreSQL) that prioritizes \textbf{1{,}200+ cases/month}, improving triage efficiency by \textbf{15\%} through explainable decision support embedded into case management workflows.

sections.title: Projects

title.value: Telecom Customer Churn \& Upsell Prediction System\enspace\faGithub

text.value: Built an end-to-end churn prediction and customer upsell system on a \textbf{7,043-customer} telecom dataset, performing data preprocessing, feature engineering (\textbf{30+ features}), and statistical modeling using \textbf{Python, Scikit-learn, and XGBoost} to identify high-risk customers and cross-sell opportunities.

bullets.raw_text: Built an end-to-end churn prediction and customer upsell system on a \textbf{7,043-customer} telecom dataset, performing data preprocessing, feature engineering (\textbf{30+ features}), and statistical modeling using \textbf{Python, Scikit-learn, and XGBoost} to identify high-risk customers and cross-sell opportunities.

text.value: Developed multiple predictive models (Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost) with comprehensive model evaluation using precision, recall, F1-score, and AUC-ROC metrics, achieving improved identification of high-risk churners in the top 10\% segment through probability calibration and threshold optimization.

bullets.raw_text: Developed multiple predictive models (Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost) with comprehensive model evaluation using precision, recall, F1-score, and AUC-ROC metrics, achieving improved identification of high-risk churners in the top 10\% segment through probability calibration and threshold optimization.

text.value: Delivered an interactive \textbf{Streamlit dashboard} displaying portfolio-level churn risk by contract type and region, plus individual customer churn probability and upsell scores with \textbf{SHAP-based driver analysis}, providing actionable insights for retention and revenue optimization strategies.

bullets.raw_text: Delivered an interactive \textbf{Streamlit dashboard} displaying portfolio-level churn risk by contract type and region, plus individual customer churn probability and upsell scores with \textbf{SHAP-based driver analysis}, providing actionable insights for retention and revenue optimization strategies.

title.value: NYC 311 Service Demand Forecasting \& Optimization System\enspace\faGithub

text.value: Designed end-to-end machine learning system for \textbf{multi-dimensional demand forecasting} using NYC 311 service data, applying time-series analysis and predictive modeling to forecast service volumes across 10 categories, directly applicable to banking operations such as call center staffing and credit demand prediction.

bullets.raw_text: Designed end-to-end machine learning system for \textbf{multi-dimensional demand forecasting} using NYC 311 service data, applying time-series analysis and predictive modeling to forecast service volumes across 10 categories, directly applicable to banking operations such as call center staffing and credit demand prediction.

text.value: Implemented \textbf{Temporal Fusion Transformer} and Prophet models for hourly demand forecasting, achieving 23\% lower MAPE than baseline through feature engineering (time-of-day, seasonality, service mix), model validation, and hyperparameter optimization, with attention mechanisms revealing key demand drivers for business interpretation.

bullets.raw_text: Implemented \textbf{Temporal Fusion Transformer} and Prophet models for hourly demand forecasting, achieving 23\% lower MAPE than baseline through feature engineering (time-of-day, seasonality, service mix), model validation, and hyperparameter optimization, with attention mechanisms revealing key demand drivers for business interpretation.

text.value: Developed \textbf{Bayesian optimization framework} for workforce allocation, reducing simulated wait times by 34\% and labor costs by 18\%; delivered interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time scenario analysis and Pareto-optimal trade-off visualization between service quality and operational efficiency.

bullets.raw_text: Developed \textbf{Bayesian optimization framework} for workforce allocation, reducing simulated wait times by 34\% and labor costs by 18\%; delivered interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time scenario analysis and Pareto-optimal trade-off visualization between service quality and operational efficiency.
